cases.prompt: 구독 결제 시나리오 전부 돌려서 테스트해줘. 한국 결제 규제도 같이 확인.

assertions.text: Runs comprehensive scenario testing across many revenue scenarios.
Includes a KR-Compliance agent and subscription scenarios.
Generates a revenue-test-report with PASS/FAIL per scenario.

cases.prompt: Run revenue QA — payment, subscription, ad, and store flows. Auto-fix failures if possible.

assertions.text: Provides an auto-fix loop for failures.
